title: S3 general purpose buckets should have Lifecycle configurations
description: This control checks whether an Amazon S3 general purpose bucket has a Lifecycle configuration. The control fails if the bucket doesn't have a Lifecycle configuration. You can provide custom values for one or more if the preceding parameters, the control passes only if the policy includes the specified storage class, deletion time, and transition time.
what_is_wrong: This control checks whether an Amazon S3 general purpose bucket has a Lifecycle configuration. The control fails if the bucket doesn't have a Lifecycle configuration. You can provide custom values for one or more if the preceding parameters, the control passes only if the policy includes the specified storage class, deletion time, and transition time.
what_the_fix_does: Applies lifecycle rules to enforce retention and cost-control posture.

findings.title: S3 general purpose buckets should have Lifecycle configurations

recommendation.rationale: Matrix cell risk_low__criticality_medium maps to default recommendation 'pr_only'. Risk is low and business criticality is medium. Criticality evidence: data_sensitivity=0.60, privilege_level=0.60, internet_exposure=0.00, matched_signals=none. Relationship context is complete enough for advisory matrix placement. Current execution surfaces stay PR-only, so this recommendation remains advisory until the reviewed bundle is applied.

execution_guidance.label: Enable lifecycle cleanup for incomplete uploads

pre_checks.message: Confirm this change is intended for arn:aws:s3:::security-autopilot-w6-envready-s311-exec-696505809372 in account 696505809372 (eu-north-1).
Confirm the repository, deployment path, and approver that own this infrastructure change before generating the PR bundle.
Provide the required strategy inputs before execution: abort_days.
No specialized dependency checks are available for this strategy yet.

execution_guidance.expected_outcome: PR mode produces a reviewable infrastructure change: A lifecycle rule will abort incomplete multipart uploads after the configured number of days. After merge and apply through your IaC path, Security Hub should reflect the remediated state within 12-24 hours.

post_checks.message: Review the generated bundle or diff, then capture plan and apply evidence after the change is merged through the normal infrastructure workflow.
Verify the completed change only affected the intended resource scope for arn:aws:s3:::security-autopilot-w6-envready-s311-exec-696505809372.
Trigger immediate re-evaluation after the change lands and confirm the action closes without reopening.

rollback.summary: Use this rollback path to revert the infrastructure change through the same reviewed delivery workflow.
notes: Prefer reverting through version control and your normal deployment pipeline so rollback stays auditable.
